name: InvokeAI
description: InvokeAI is an open-source AI image generation platform with a web UI, workflows, and model management for local inference.

notes.text: Torch backend auto-selects from available GPU devices (`cu128` for NVIDIA, `rocm7.2` for AMD) and falls back to CPU.
Use `var_torch_backend=cpu|cu128|rocm7.2` to force a specific backend during install/update.
Open the web UI and use the built-in model manager to download or import models after first start.
